name: SAS Intelligent Decisioning
description: Real-time decisioning platform that combines business rules with machine learning models to automate complex decisions across fraud scoring, next-best-action, pricing, and customer engagement.
elevatorPitch: Combine business rules with ML models for real-time automated decisions — fraud scoring, next-best-action, pricing.
capabilities: Visual business rules engine with drag-and-drop authoring
ML model integration (any framework — Python, SAS, PMML, ONNX)
Real-time REST API decisioning with <50ms latency
A/B testing and champion/challenger for decision strategies
Complete decision audit trails for regulatory compliance
Event-driven architecture with streaming data support
Simulation and what-if analysis before deployment
targetBuyer: Head of Digital, Chief Risk Officer, Head of Marketing Analytics, Head of Operations
phUseCases: Next-best-offer for telco customer retention (Globe, Smart)
Automated underwriting for insurance (Sun Life, Manulife)
Credit limit decisioning for digital banks (Maya, Tonik)
Dynamic pricing for retail and e-commerce
